2026-04-21T13:18:22.2609194Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-21T13:18:22.2609719Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-21T13:18:22.2610124Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-21T13:18:22.2610469Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-21T13:18:22.2610766Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-21T13:18:22.2610991Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-21T13:18:22.2611143Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-21T13:18:22.2611333Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-21T13:18:22.2611494Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-21T13:18:22.2611720Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-21T13:18:22.2611914Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-21T13:18:22.2612183Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-21T13:18:22.2612430Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

2026-04-21T13:19:47.7685219Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-21T13:19:32.132351377Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":58445,\"title\":\"[Mgmt Generator] Base dependency bump changes output-only model classification  breaks custom code and API compatibility\",\"body\":\"### Description\\n\\nAfter bumping the `@azure-typespec/http-client-csharp` base dependency from `1.0.0-alpha.20260408.3` to `1.0.0-alpha.20260415.3` (PR #58419, which includes `@azure-tools/typespec-client-generator-core` 0.67.2), several output-only model types changed their generated signatures:\\n\\n- **Parameterless constructors**: `public`  `internal`\\n- **Properties**: `{ get; set; }`  `{ get; }` (get-only)\\n\\nThis causes two categories of failures observed in the validate-typespec PR #58438:\\n\\n### 1. Build Failure  `Azure.ResourceManager.DataProtectionBackup`\\n\\nThe custom backward-compat overload in `ArmDataProtectionBackupModelFactory.cs` uses object initializer syntax to set properties on `BackupInstanceProtectionStatusDetails`:\\n\\n```csharp\\nreturn new BackupInstanceProtectionStatusDetails\\n{\\n    ProtectionStatusErrorDetails = ...,  // CS0200: read only\\n    Status = status                       // CS0200: read only\\n};\\n```\\n\\nPreviously these properties had `{ get; set; }` accessors; the new generator produces `{ get; }`.\\n\\n### 2. ApiCompat Failures  4 GA libraries\\n\\nTypes that were previously unsealed (public constructor, virtual serialization members) are now effectively sealed (internal constructor, non-virtual members):\\n\\n| Library | Affected Types |\\n|---|---|\\n| **AppComplianceAutomation** | `AppComplianceCategory`, `AppComplianceControl`, `CustomerResponsibility`, `RecommendationDetails`, `RecommendationSolution`, `ReportOverviewStatus`, `ResponsibilityResourceItem` |\\n| **Resources.DeploymentStacks** | `DeploymentExtension` |\\n| **Search** | `SearchServiceNetworkSecurityPerimeter` |\\n| **Storage** | `BlobContainerImmutabilityPolicy`, `BlobRestoreStatus`, `GeoReplicationStatistics`, `LegalHoldProperties`, `LegalHoldTag`, `ProtectedAppendWritesHistory`, `StorageAccountEndpoints`, `StorageAccountInternetEndpoints`, `StorageAccountIPv6Endpoints`, `StorageAccountKeyCreationTime`, `StorageAccountMicrosoftEndpoints`, `UpdateHistoryEntry` |\\n\\n### Root Cause\\n\\nThe TypeSpec models for these types have no explicit `@visibility` decorators on their properties, but are referenced only from `@visibility(Lifecycle.Read)` contexts. The new TCGC version (0.67.2) correctly infers them as output-only, but the **previous** version treated them as round-trip  giving them public constructors and property setters.\\n\\nExample from `DataProtection/models.tsp`:\\n```typespec\\nmodel ProtectionStatusDetails {\\n  errorDetails?: UserFacingError;\\n  status?: Status;\\n}\\n```\\n\\nReferenced as:\\n```typespec\\n@visibility(Lifecycle.Read)\\nprotectionStatus?: ProtectionStatusDetails;\\n```\\n\\n### Expected Behavior\\n\\nFor models that were previously generated with public constructors and property setters (i.e., shipped as part of GA libraries), the generator should either:\\n1. Continue generating setters/public constructors to preserve API compatibility, or\\n2. Generate backward-compat overloads in the ModelFactory that use internal constructors instead of object initializer syntax\\n\\n### Reproduction\\n\\nRegenerate any of the affected libraries with the `1.0.0-alpha.20260415.3` base dependency and compare with the previous output.\\n\\n### Related\\n\\n- Validate-typespec PR: #58438\\n- Base bump PR: #58419\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/58445\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"ArcturusZhang\",\"id\":10554446,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/ArcturusZhang\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/10554446?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"MEMBER\",\"labels\":[\"Mgmt\",\"CodeGen\"],\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":1,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":1},\"created_at\":\"2026-04-21T13:16:48Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-04-21T13:16:48Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}

2026-04-21T13:19:47.7712621Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-21T13:19:32.404385358Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":58445,\"title\":\"[Mgmt Generator] Base dependency bump changes output-only model classification  breaks custom code and API compatibility\",\"body\":\"### Description\\n\\nAfter bumping the `@azure-typespec/http-client-csharp` base dependency from `1.0.0-alpha.20260408.3` to `1.0.0-alpha.20260415.3` (PR #58419, which includes `@azure-tools/typespec-client-generator-core` 0.67.2), several output-only model types changed their generated signatures:\\n\\n- **Parameterless constructors**: `public`  `internal`\\n- **Properties**: `{ get; set; }`  `{ get; }` (get-only)\\n\\nThis causes two categories of failures observed in the validate-typespec PR #58438:\\n\\n### 1. Build Failure  `Azure.ResourceManager.DataProtectionBackup`\\n\\nThe custom backward-compat overload in `ArmDataProtectionBackupModelFactory.cs` uses object initializer syntax to set properties on `BackupInstanceProtectionStatusDetails`:\\n\\n```csharp\\nreturn new BackupInstanceProtectionStatusDetails\\n{\\n    ProtectionStatusErrorDetails = ...,  // CS0200: read only\\n    Status = status                       // CS0200: read only\\n};\\n```\\n\\nPreviously these properties had `{ get; set; }` accessors; the new generator produces `{ get; }`.\\n\\n### 2. ApiCompat Failures  4 GA libraries\\n\\nTypes that were previously unsealed (public constructor, virtual serialization members) are now effectively sealed (internal constructor, non-virtual members):\\n\\n| Library | Affected Types |\\n|---|---|\\n| **AppComplianceAutomation** | `AppComplianceCategory`, `AppComplianceControl`, `CustomerResponsibility`, `RecommendationDetails`, `RecommendationSolution`, `ReportOverviewStatus`, `ResponsibilityResourceItem` |\\n| **Resources.DeploymentStacks** | `DeploymentExtension` |\\n| **Search** | `SearchServiceNetworkSecurityPerimeter` |\\n| **Storage** | `BlobContainerImmutabilityPolicy`, `BlobRestoreStatus`, `GeoReplicationStatistics`, `LegalHoldProperties`, `LegalHoldTag`, `ProtectedAppendWritesHistory`, `StorageAccountEndpoints`, `StorageAccountInternetEndpoints`, `StorageAccountIPv6Endpoints`, `StorageAccountKeyCreationTime`, `StorageAccountMicrosoftEndpoints`, `UpdateHistoryEntry` |\\n\\n### Root Cause\\n\\nThe TypeSpec models for these types have no explicit `@visibility` decorators on their properties, but are referenced only from `@visibility(Lifecycle.Read)` contexts. The new TCGC version (0.67.2) correctly infers them as output-only, but the **previous** version treated them as round-trip  giving them public constructors and property setters.\\n\\nExample from `DataProtection/models.tsp`:\\n```typespec\\nmodel ProtectionStatusDetails {\\n  errorDetails?: UserFacingError;\\n  status?: Status;\\n}\\n```\\n\\nReferenced as:\\n```typespec\\n@visibility(Lifecycle.Read)\\nprotectionStatus?: ProtectionStatusDetails;\\n```\\n\\n### Expected Behavior\\n\\nFor models that were previously generated with public constructors and property setters (i.e., shipped as part of GA libraries), the generator should either:\\n1. Continue generating setters/public constructors to preserve API compatibility, or\\n2. Generate backward-compat overloads in the ModelFactory that use internal constructors instead of object initializer syntax\\n\\n### Reproduction\\n\\nRegenerate any of the affected libraries with the `1.0.0-alpha.20260415.3` base dependency and compare with the previous output.\\n\\n### Related\\n\\n- Validate-typespec PR: #58438\\n- Base bump PR: #58419\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/58445\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"ArcturusZhang\",\"id\":10554446,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/ArcturusZhang\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/10554446?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"MEMBER\",\"labels\":[\"Mgmt\",\"CodeGen\"],\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":1,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":1},\"created_at\":\"2026-04-21T13:16:48Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-04-21T13:16:48Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}
